name: notiflows/skills
description: Agent skills for Notiflows — create and manage notiflows as code, with the CLI and MCP.

notiflows-schema.description: The notiflow.json flat-steps format: step types, positions, branching, conditions, and per-type settings.

notiflows-template-schema.description: Channel templates: the {channel_type, data} shape, per-channel fields, content_type enums, and @-suffix body extraction.

notiflows-cli.description: The @notiflows/cli tool: install, account-token auth, pull/push/publish/validate/diff, and notiflow run.

notiflows-docs-support.description: Where to find authoritative answers: the docs, llms.txt, the CLI and MCP, and how to get unstuck.
